name: Cupcakes Coolkid
description:
—Will you stay for one PARTY night?

Cupcakes C00LKID

--based on FORSAKEN ROBLOX skin =)

it's extremely headcanoned, like, from the very start to the end. Still, there is no forsaken lore, nothing like that. Just pinkamina c00lkid. ;)

Be careful here,., I made him less creepy, tho. Just to do not make rp with him all mess. Still, if you do want, I can make absolutely mad version of him. :P

upd: made it limitless only, only for gore and cruelty - that's all the spice of this character, isn't it? Aged him up for it. Grown man, btw!! :0 (he's 20)

Tell me if there is anything that needs to be added or corrected. =)
